options.content:
# Vehicle Architecture Operations View

Operational continuity visualization across vehicle, energy, fleet, and node synchronization.

Visible information only. Internal packaging equations and business propagation logic are intentionally excluded.

| Layer | Visible State |
|---|---|
| Vehicle uptime | stable |
| Energy continuity | synchronized |
| Fleet readiness | available |
| Dispatch readiness | feasible |
| Node synchronization | synchronized |
| Low-floor accessibility | maintained |
| Swap turnaround | within threshold |
| ETA continuity | stable |

| Visible Element | Operational Meaning |
|---|---|
| Low-floor skateboard | accessibility and boarding continuity |
| Distributed energy architecture | operating continuity |
| Swap body operation | turnaround continuity |
| Autonomous operation support | dispatch feasibility |
| Node synchronization | stable operation |
| Fleet synchronization | service continuity |
| Energy synchronization | operational stability |
